tasks.instruction: Match each description (A-L) to the correct person. Three descriptions do not match any person.

options.text: This person works in a hospital and helps people who are sick or injured get better.
This person stands in front of a class every day and explains new things to young people.
This person works in a kitchen and creates delicious meals for hungry customers.
At the weekend, this person reads books about the human body and new medicines.
In the evening, this person enjoys making worksheets and thinking of fun activities for lessons.
After work, this person likes visiting food markets to discover unusual ingredients from around the world.
This person sometimes works at night because patients need care at all hours.
This person believes that every child can learn if you find the right way to explain things.
This person once won a local competition for the best chocolate cake.
This person spends most of the day outdoors, taking care of animals on a large farm.
This person travels to different countries and takes photographs of old buildings.
This person fixes cars and motorcycles in a small garage near the town centre.
